title: agent-dispatch-evaluator dispatch_config envelope
description: Substrate-neutral pre-dispatch evaluator config. Governs the universal model right-sizer that fires at every Agent dispatch / Workflow agent() call / thing-decide.py seat dispatch. The minimal default (rollback target) requires only schema_version, enabled, mode, and rationale; the full envelope additionally carries allowlist, sampler config, latency circuit-breaker, and async mode.

schema_version.description: Envelope schema version. Adapter logs a warning on mismatch and falls back to defaults.

enabled.description: Feature flag. When false, the evaluator hook short-circuits with a single grep (zero cost for non-adopters). When true, the classifier fires on each non-allowlisted, non-skip-marked dispatch.

mode.description: shadow = log verdicts, never mutate opts.model. binding = apply verdicts per the precedence rules (tribunal seats are still shadow forever per tribunal_seat_mode).

subagent_type_allowlist.description: Subagent types that bypass the evaluator entirely (zero-cost short-circuit). Defaults: Explore, statusline-setup, claude (catch-all).

downgrade_blocked_types.description: Subagent types where downgrades are blocked (auto-revert list populated by the quality-regression sampler when a type accumulates >=3 consecutive failed samples). Upgrades still allowed; only downgrade verdicts are suppressed for listed types.

rate.description: Fraction of downgraded dispatches sampled for post-hoc quality scoring. 0.20 during MVP shadow soak, 0.05 post-flip.

judge_model.description: Model used by the post-hoc judge. Haiku 4.5 default — runs via Batch API for ~50% cost reduction (verify-at-use on anthropic.com/pricing).

use_batch_api.description: When true, judge runs via Batch API (cheaper, async). When false, judge runs synchronously (faster, more expensive).

median_ms_threshold.description: Rolling-window median latency threshold (ms). When exceeded, the rest of the session flips to pass-through mode and writes a Heimdall amber event.

window_size.description: Number of recent dispatches considered for the rolling median.

tribunal_seat_mode.description: Tribunal seat enforcement mode. Forever-shadow for MVP — protects the v0.32.0 backbone-diversity invariant. Re-evaluate after 4-6 weeks of shadow data.

async_mode.description: When true, classifier verdict applies to the NEXT dispatch of same subagent_type within the session (in-memory cache). Default OFF. Phase 5 latency measurement decides Phase 6 default.

rationale.description: Mandatory human-readable one-sentence justification for the current configuration. Audit-trail field.
